---
title: "Pilot Protoplanetary Disk Catalog"
---

# Pilot Protoplanetary Disk Catalog

This project is an educational and computational pilot catalog of protoplanetary disks based on observational data.

## Available disks

[AS 209](pages/as_209.qmd)
[HL Tau](pages/hl_tau.qmd)
[HD 163296](pages/hd_163296.qmd)
